headline: Should You Buy, Sell, or Hold McKesson Before Q4 Earnings?
summary: MCK heads into Q4 earnings with strength in oncology, GLP-1 demand, and biopharma services, but softer medical-surgical trends may weigh.

headline: Clover Health Q1 Earnings Meet Estimates, Sales Beat, Membership Rises
summary: CLOV posts 62% revenue growth in Q1 as Medicare Advantage membership surges and AI-driven care initiatives boost profitability.

headline: AVNS Gains After Posting Q1 Earnings Miss & Revenue Beat, Margins Down
summary: Avanos Medical tops Q1 revenue estimates on strong SNS growth, but margin pressure and PM&R weakness weigh on earnings and profitability.

headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in Cardinal (CAH): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Cardinal (CAH) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?
